Title: Osney Bridge access closure Oxford
Description: Access ramp at Botley Road/Osney Bridge closed due to water works. Diversion via Abbey Road in place.

Title: Marsh Lock footbridge closure Henley
Description: Footbridge closed for safety. 3-mile diversion via A4155 between Henley and Shiplake. Order initially until 31 Jan 2026, may be extended.

Title: Sandford Footbridge closure
Description: Unsafe footbridge north of Sandford Lock closed by Environment Agency. Diversion via NCN 5.

Title: Abingdon Weir walkway closure
Description: Walkway across weir closed due to corrosion. Rerouted via Abingdon town centre. May reopen at low river levels.

Title: Temple Footbridge closure near Marlow
Description: Footbridge closed due to structural damage. Diversion via Marlow Bridge and Bisham Abbey.

Title: Bridge 142 closure near Runnymede M25
Description: Cast iron bridge closed due to structural cracks. Diversion via A308. Expected closure until 2027.

Title: Bell Weir refurbishment works
Description: Small diversion around compound at Runnymede Pleasure Grounds. Bell Weir Lock remains operational. Refurbishment 2026-2027.

Title: Streatley-Goring towpath diversion
Description: Half-mile towpath closure due to erosion. Diversion via Manor Road and Footpath 227. Unlikely to reopen until late 2026.

Title: Penton Hook Island closure
Description: No access to island due to diseased trees. Thames Path unaffected.

Title: Ten Foot Bridge closure Faringdon
Description: Bridge closed March 2024 due to structural safety concerns. Footpath diversion on designated footpaths in place. Reassessment by end January 2026.

Title: Brentford Grand Union Canal disruption
Description: Partial reopening. Path blocked between bridge over River Brent and Brentford Marina on left bank. Redevelopment ongoing, parts now accessible.

Title: Benson Weir diversion open
Description: Diversion in place via Preston Crowmarsh and Howbery Business Park crossing at Wallingford Bridge. Path reopened 1 April 2026.
